nodalDepartmentName.label: Medical Health And Family Welfare Department

schemeContent.detailedDescription_md: The scheme “Khushiyon Ki Sawari Sewa” has been launched by the Department of Medical Health and Family Welfare, Government of Uttarakhand. It aims to provide free and safe transport for pregnant women and newborn babies (0 -1 year) to and from the hospital, with services easily accessible by calling 102.
schemeContent.benefits_md: Under this scheme, pregnant women are provided free transportation from the hospital to their homes along with their newborns after delivery. Additionally, pregnant are also provided free to-and-fro transportation from home to the hospital for ultrasound services. These facilities are being provided across the state through 128 vehicles.
schemeContent.briefDescription: The scheme aims to provide safe, timely, and free transportation for pregnant women and newborn babies (0 - 1 year) to access healthcare services, including travel from home to the hospital and from the hospital back home.

children.text: The scheme “Khushiyon Ki Sawari Sewa” has been launched by the Department of Medical Health and Family Welfare, Government of Uttarakhand. It aims to provide free and safe transport for pregnant women and newborn babies (0 -1 year) to and from the hospital, with services easily accessible by calling 102.

Under this scheme, pregnant women are provided free transportation from the hospital to their homes along with their newborns after delivery. Additionally, pregnant are also provided free to-and-fro transportation from home to the hospital for ultrasound services.
These facilities are being provided across the state through 128 vehicles.
The services can be availed free of cost by calling 102.

applicationProcess.process_md: The services can be availed free of cost by calling 102.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md: 1. The beneficiary must be a resident of Uttarakhand. 1. The beneficiary must be a pregnant woman or a newborn baby aged 0 to 1 year.

children.text: The beneficiary must be a resident of Uttarakhand.
The beneficiary must be a pregnant woman or a newborn baby aged 0 to 1 year.
